zh.lifeSummary: 當Hadewig van Merum於1175年出生在荷蘭利包格梅盧姆時，她的父親Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum35歲，母親Aleidis van Horne35歲。她於1194年與Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk在荷蘭利包格梅盧姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1235年在法國奧維阿利也洛萊享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hadewig van Merum于1175年出生在荷兰利包格梅盧姆时，她的父亲Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum35岁，母亲Aleidis van Horne35岁。她于1194年与Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk在荷兰利包格梅盧姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1235年在法国奧維阿利也洛萊享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Merum
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from either of two farmsteads named Marheimar in Old Norse, most likely from marr ‘horse’ + heimr ‘homestead, farmstead’.
Irish: name of unexplained etymology. It is the surname of a distinguished family recorded in Kilkenny since the 1690s, and is also found in County Durham, England.

nameMeanings.name: Hadewig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Manfred.

variants.name: Ludwig
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

en.lifeSummary: When Hadewig van Merum was born in 1175, in Merum, Limburg, Netherlands, her father, Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum, was 35 and her mother, Aleidis van Horne, was 35. She married Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk in 1194, in Merum, Limburg, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1235, in Lorraine, Allier, Auvergne, France, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hadewig van Merum est née en 1175, à Merum, Limbourg, Pays-Bas, son père, Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Aleidis van Horne, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk en 1194, à Merum, Limbourg, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1235, à Lorraine, Allier, Auvergne, France, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hadewig van Merum 1175 in Merum, Limburg, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum 35 und ihre Mutter Aleidis van Horne 35. Sie hat 1194 in Merum, Limburg, Niederlande Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1235 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Lorraine, Allier, Auvergne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hadewig van Merum è nata il nel 1175 nel Merum, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Aleidis van Horne, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk nel 1194, nel Merum, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1235, nel Lorraine, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hadewig van Merumが1175年にオランダリンブルグメルムで生まれた時，父Rutger Koenraadsz van Merumは35歳，母Aleidis van Horneは35歳であった。1194年にオランダリンブルグメルムでAlbert Hendrikz van Cuijkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1235年にフランスアウバーグンアリールロレィヌで61歳で死去した。

ko.Grave, Land van Cuijk, North Brabant, Ne: 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 랜드 버 쿠이제이크 그레이브
ko.lifeSummary: Hadewig van Merum(이)가 1175년 네덜란드 림버그 머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aleidis van Horne(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1194년 네덜란드 림버그 머에서 Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1235년 프랑스 오버그니 앨리어 로레이인에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hadewig van Merum nasceu em 1175, em Merum, Limburgo, Países Baixos, seu pai, Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Aleidis van Horne, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk em 1194, em Merum, Limburgo, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Grave, Land van Cuijk, North Brabant, Ne: грав, ланд ван куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hadewig van Merum родилась в 1175 г. в местности мирум, лимбург, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Aleidis van Horne, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk в 1194 г. в местности мирум, лимбург, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1235 г. в местности лорреаин, аллиир, аувиргн, Франция в возрасте 61 год.

Se casó con Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk en 1194, en Merum, Limburg, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1235, en Lorraine, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, a la edad de 61 años.
